title: T-026 — FEFO compliance check + deviation reason capture
prompt:
# T-026 — FEFO compliance check + deviation reason

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.2 FR-08-E2-007, §11.1, §13 R10

## Goal
In consume-to-wo, when chosen LP differs from fefo_suggested_lp_id, set fefo_adherence_flag=false and require fefo_deviation_reason from a predefined list (R10).

## Implementation contract
Extend consume-to-wo zod schema: when fefo_suggested_lp_id provided AND lp_id != fefo_suggested_lp_id, body must also include fefo_deviation_reason ∈ enum {expired_alt, qty_insufficient, location_unavailable, qa_hold, operator_override}. Compute fefo_adherence_flag accordingly. Persist fefo_deviation_reason on wo_material_consumption row. Return 422 ValidationError if deviation occurs without reason. Add observability: log when fefo_adherence_flag=false with reason.

## Files (scope)
- packages/api-services/production/consume-to-wo.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/production/fefo-deviation-enum.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/fefo-deviation.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given lp_id == fefo_suggested_lp_id, when POST consume, then fefo_adherence_flag=true and fefo_deviation_reason is null
2. Given lp_id != fefo_suggested_lp_id without fefo_deviation_reason, when POST consume, then 422 ValidationError listing fefo_deviation_reason
3. Given lp_id != fefo_suggested_lp_id and fefo_deviation_reason='expired_alt', when POST consume, then 200 with fefo_adherence_flag=false and reason persisted

## Test strategy
- RED: test asserting all 3 paths before consume-to-wo modification
- Run 'pnpm --filter api-services test fefo-deviation'

## Risk red lines
- Do not accept free-text fefo_deviation_reason (must be enum to prevent gaming R10)
- Do not skip flag when fefo_suggested_lp_id absent (treat as adherent only when explicitly suggested)
- Do not allow non-enumerated reason values

pipeline_inputs.description: FEFO deviation reason enforced via enum on deviation; flag persisted on consumption row.
pipeline_inputs.details: Enum fefo_deviation_enum (5 values). Zod cross-field validation: deviation requires reason. Flag false only when explicit suggestion and chosen LP differs. Observability hook fires structured log on deviation.
out_of_scope: Do not implement FEFO suggestion (05-WH owns)
Do not implement KPI dashboard for FEFO (T-052)
Do not modify schema beyond enum
acceptance_criteria: Given lp_id == fefo_suggested_lp_id, when POST, then fefo_adherence_flag=true and reason null
Given deviation without reason, when POST, then 422 listing fefo_deviation_reason
Given deviation with reason 'expired_alt', when POST, then 200 + flag false + reason persisted
test_strategy: RED: tests asserting all 3 paths before service change
risk_red_lines: Do not invert flag logic when suggestion absent
Do not allow values outside enum
